title: Aldrich's Hidden Bench
description: Explore Aldrich Park and locate the iconic bench that is directly underneath a very large, distinctive tree near the center of the ring. Take a picture of yourself with this specific bench and tree.
verificationPrompt: Submit your selfie with the designated bench and tree in Aldrich Park.

title: Sculptural Secrets
description: Visit the 'Gateway' sculpture located between the Student Center and Aldrich Park. On its base, find the year of its dedication. It's subtle!
verificationPrompt: What year is inscribed on the base of the 'Gateway' sculpture?

title: Library Labyrinth
description: Navigate to the Langson Library. Once inside, find a comfy study spot on the third floor and identify the color of the study chairs in that area.
verificationPrompt: What color are the study chairs on the third floor of Langson Library?
